intended_use: Neurophet AQUA is intended for Automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric data may be compared to r
intended_use_full: Neurophet AQUA is intended for Automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric data may be compared to reference percentile data.
target_condition: Assessment of brain structures and lesions on structural MRI; applicable to healthy subjects, mild cognitive impairment, Alzheimer's disease, and multiple sclerosis
ground_truth: Consensus manual segmentations by three U.S.-based neuroradiologists
other_metrics: Dice coefficient >0.80 for lesion segmentation accuracy; mean absolute lesion volume difference <0.25cc for reproducibility
